latency.title: Latency
latency.summary: How long it takes your browser to reach our nearest server and back.
latency.footer: Live HTTP ping to the edge · not a download speed test

glossary.label: Round-trip time
glossary.description: Time for a small request to travel to the server and return. Lower is better.

glossary.label: Stability
glossary.description: How much latency varies between samples. Lower means a more stable connection.

glossary.label: Where we measure
glossary.description: The closest Cloudflare location handling your traffic. This measures distance to that server, not to every website on the internet.
